## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on GrowthX's content scaling and SEO services for Teleport](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX blends automation with expert-driven content creation to help brands scale high-quality content for SEO and generative engines](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Their process starts with an "editorial layer" strategy sprint (6-8 weeks) to align on topics, personas, and content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [GrowthX's team includes former TechCrunch and SEMrush leaders, combining publishing expertise with SEO/growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Their proprietary workflows and AI tools enable rapid, high-quality content production (5-15 articles/week) after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach and Expertise

  - [Focus on helping brands operate like publishers and scale quality content](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Blend of automation and expert-in-loop processes](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Start with "editorial layer" for longer-form content to build foundation](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Team includes ex-TechCrunch editor (Matthew Panzerino), SEO experts (e.g., Dave from Fanatics/TripAdvisor), and former SEMrush lead editor](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

### Content Strategy and Production Process

  - [6-8 week strategy sprint to develop editorial roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Use of Airtable for "Content OS" to track topics, keywords, and content status](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Proprietary workflows combine AI tools with human expertise for rapid production](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Calibration period to align on brand voice, style, and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Differentiation and Tools

  - [Custom workflows and AI integration enable high-quality, rapid content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop steps throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Continuous refinement of inputs based on client feedback and performance data](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Focus on answering user questions effectively to build brand equity](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### SEO and Traffic Growth

  - [Example shown of Abnormal Security's content success](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Discussion of StrongDM's recent content acceleration and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Analysis of Teleport's current content strategy, noting opportunity in blog content](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Engagement Timeline and Scaling

  - [Weeks 4-6: Establish roadmap, personas, and initial content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Weeks 8-12: Ramp up to 5-15 articles per week, based on strategy and needs](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Focus on laying foundation before optimizing for conversions](https://fathom.video/share/x_c5Poj6MuspnvmCiq9Ad6B1VfsfYHHr?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
